```diff

+ const net = require('net');
+ 
+ async function sendDXSpotIRC({ originator, dxCall, frequency, comment, mode = 'SSB' }) {
+   return new Promise((resolve) => {
+     const client = new net.Socket();
+     
+     client.setTimeout(30000); // 30 second timeout
+     
+     // Try multiple IRC servers that feed DXSummit.fi
+     const ircServers = [
+       { host: 'irc.choopa.net', port: 6667, channel: '#CQDX' },
+       { host: 'irc.choopa.net', port: 6668, channel: '#CQDX' },
+       { host: 'irc.choopa.net', port: 6669, channel: '#CQDX' },
+       { host: 'irc.choopa.net', port: 7000, channel: '#CQDX' },
+       { host: 'irc.choopa.net', port: 7001, channel: '#CQDX' }
+     ];
+     
+     let currentServerIndex = 0;
+     let connected = false;
+     let joinedChannel = false;
+     let spotSent = false;
+     let stepTimeout;
+     
+     const resetTimeout = () => {
+       if (stepTimeout) clearTimeout(stepTimeout);
+       stepTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
+         console.error('[DXSPOT-IRC] Step timeout - closing connection');
+         client.destroy();
+         resolve({ success: false, error: 'IRC operation timeout' });
+       }, 15000);
+     };
+     
+     const tryNextServer = () => {
+       if (currentServerIndex < ircServers.length) {
+         const server = ircServers[currentServerIndex];
+         console.log(`[DXSPOT-IRC] Trying server ${currentServerIndex + 1}/${ircServers.length}: ${server.host}:${server.port}`);
+         
+         client.connect(server.port, server.host, () => {
+           console.log(`[DXSPOT-IRC] Connected to ${server.host}:${server.port}`);
+           connected = true;
+           resetTimeout();
+         });
+         
+         currentServerIndex++;
+       } else {
+         console.error('[DXSPOT-IRC] All IRC servers failed');
+         resolve({ success: false, error: 'All IRC servers failed' });
+       }
+     };
+     
+     client.on('data', (data) => {
+       const received = data.toString();
+       console.log('[DXSPOT-IRC] Received:', JSON.stringify(received));
+       
+       // Handle PING
+       if (received.includes('PING')) {
+         const pong = received.replace('PING', 'PONG');
+         console.log('[DXSPOT-IRC] Sending PONG');
+         client.write(pong);
+         return;
+       }
+       
+       // Send NICK and USER if not done yet
+       if (connected && !joinedChannel && !received.includes('001')) {
+         console.log('[DXSPOT-IRC] Sending NICK:', originator);
+         client.write(`NICK ${originator}\r\n`);
+         client.write(`USER ${originator} 0 * :${originator}\r\n`);
+         resetTimeout();
+         return;
+       }
+       
+       // Join channel after successful registration
+       if (received.includes('001') && !joinedChannel) {
+         const server = ircServers[currentServerIndex - 1];
+         console.log(`[DXSPOT-IRC] Joining channel: ${server.channel}`);
+         client.write(`JOIN ${server.channel}\r\n`);
+         joinedChannel = true;
+         resetTimeout();
+         return;
+       }
+       
+       // Send spot after joining channel
+       if (joinedChannel && !spotSent && (received.includes('353') || received.includes('366'))) {
+         setTimeout(() => {
+           const spotMessage = `DX ${frequency} ${dxCall} ${comment}`;
+           const server = ircServers[currentServerIndex - 1];
+           console.log(`[DXSPOT-IRC] Sending spot to ${server.channel}:`, spotMessage);
+           client.write(`PRIVMSG ${server.channel} :${spotMessage}\r\n`);
+           spotSent = true;
+           resetTimeout();
+         }, 2000); // Wait 2 seconds after joining
+         return;
+       }
+       
+       // Check for spot confirmation or errors
+       if (spotSent) {
+         if (received.includes('PRIVMSG') || received.includes('NOTICE')) {
+           console.log('[DXSPOT-IRC] Spot sent successfully');
+           client.destroy();
+           resolve({ success: true, message: 'Spot sent successfully via IRC.' });
+           return;
+         }
+       }
+       
+       // Handle errors
+       if (received.includes('ERROR') || received.includes('433') || received.includes('465')) {
+         console.error('[DXSPOT-IRC] IRC error:', received);
+         client.destroy();
+         tryNextServer();
+         return;
+       }
+       
+       resetTimeout();
+     });
+     
+     client.on('close', () => {
+       console.log('[DXSPOT-IRC] Connection closed');
+       if (stepTimeout) clearTimeout(stepTimeout);
+       if (!spotSent) {
+         tryNextServer();
+       }
+     });
+     
+     client.on('error', (err) => {
+       console.error('[DXSPOT-IRC] Error:', err);
+       if (stepTimeout) clearTimeout(stepTimeout);
+       if (!connected) {
+         tryNextServer();
+       } else {
+         resolve({ success: false, error: err.message });
+       }
+     });
+     
+     // Start with first server
+     tryNextServer();
+   });
+ }
+ 
+ module.exports = { sendDXSpotIRC }; 
```

I can see the problem! The issue is in the logic flow. Looking at your logs, VE7CC is asking for a second login prompt after the first one, but the code isn't handling this properly. Let me fix this:

```diff
-     let loggedIn = false;
+     let loginStep = 0; // 0 = not logged in, 1 = first login sent, 2 = fully logged in
      let spotSent = false;
      let stepTimeout;
```

```diff
+ // Enhanced function that tries multiple clusters
+ async function sendDXSpotMultiCluster({ originator, dxCall, frequency, comment, mode = 'SSB' }) {
+   const clusters = [
+     { name: 'VE7CC', host: 've7cc.net', port: 23 },
+     { name: 'W1DX', host: 'w1dx.dxcluster.net', port: 23 },
+     { name: 'W1DX-Alt', host: 'dxc.w1dx.org', port: 23 }
+   ];
+   
+   for (const cluster of clusters) {
+     console.log(`[DXSPOT] Trying cluster: ${cluster.name} (${cluster.host}:${cluster.port})`);
+     
+     try {
+       const result = await sendDXSpotToCluster({ 
+         originator, 
+         dxCall, 
+         frequency, 
+         comment, 
+         mode, 
+         host: cluster.host, 
+         port: cluster.port 
+       });
+       
+       if (result.success) {
+         console.log(`[DXSPOT] Success with ${cluster.name}`);
+         return { ...result, cluster: cluster.name };
+       } else {
+         console.log(`[DXSPOT] Failed with ${cluster.name}: ${result.error}`);
+       }
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.log(`[DXSPOT] Error with ${cluster.name}: ${error.message}`);
+     }
+   }
+   
+   return { success: false, error: 'All clusters failed' };
+ }
+ 
+ // Helper function for specific cluster
+ async function sendDXSpotToCluster({ originator, dxCall, frequency, comment, mode = 'SSB', host, port }) {
+   return new Promise((resolve) => {
+     const client = new net.Socket();
+     
+     client.setTimeout(20000);
+     
+     client.connect(port, host, () => {
+       console.log(`[DXSPOT] Connected to ${host}:${port}`);
+     });
+     
+     let dataBuffer = '';
+     let loginStep = 0;
+     let spotSent = false;
+     let stepTimeout;
+     let loginAttempts = 0;
+     const maxLoginAttempts = 3;
+     
+     const resetTimeout = () => {
+       if (stepTimeout) clearTimeout(stepTimeout);
+       stepTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
+         console.error(`[DXSPOT] Step timeout - closing connection to ${host}`);
+         client.destroy();
+         resolve({ success: false, error: 'Operation timeout' });
+       }, 15000);
+     };
+     
+     const sendLogin = () => {
+       if (loginAttempts >= maxLoginAttempts) {
+         console.error(`[DXSPOT] Max login attempts reached for ${host}`);
+         client.destroy();
+         resolve({ success: false, error: 'Max login attempts reached' });
+         return;
+       }
+       
+       loginAttempts++;
+       console.log(`[DXSPOT] Sending login attempt ${loginAttempts}/${maxLoginAttempts} to ${host}:`, originator);
+       client.write(`${originator}\r\n`);
+       resetTimeout();
+     };
+     
+     client.on('data', (data) => {
+       const received = data.toString();
+       dataBuffer += received;
+       console.log(`[DXSPOT] Received from ${host}:`, JSON.stringify(received));
+       
+       // Handle first login prompt
+       if (loginStep === 0 && dataBuffer.includes('Please enter your call:')) {
+         console.log(`[DXSPOT] First login prompt detected on ${host}`);
+         sendLogin();
+         loginStep = 1;
+         return;
+       }
+       
+       // Handle second login prompt
+       if (loginStep === 1 && dataBuffer.includes('login:')) {
+         console.log(`[DXSPOT] Second login prompt detected on ${host}`);
+         sendLogin();
+         loginStep = 2;
+         return;
+       }
+       
+       // Handle command error
+       if (dataBuffer.includes('command error') && loginStep >= 1) {
+         console.log(`[DXSPOT] Command error detected on ${host}, retrying login`);
+         dataBuffer = '';
+         loginStep = 0;
+         setTimeout(() => {
+           sendLogin();
+         }, 1000);
+         return;
+       }
+       
+       // Check for successful login and send spot
+       if (loginStep >= 1 && !spotSent && (dataBuffer.includes('CCC >') || dataBuffer.includes('dxspider >'))) {
+         setTimeout(() => {
+           if (mode === 'FT8') {
+             console.log(`[DXSPOT] Sending FT8 mode command to ${host}`);
+             client.write('SET/FT8\r\n');
+             setTimeout(() => {
+               sendSpot();
+             }, 1000);
+           } else {
+             console.log(`[DXSPOT] No special mode command needed for ${mode} on ${host}`);
+             sendSpot();
+           }
+         }, 500);
+         
+         function sendSpot() {
+           const spotMessage = `DX ${frequency} ${dxCall} ${comment}`;
+           console.log(`[DXSPOT] Sending spot to ${host}:`, spotMessage);
+           client.write(`${spotMessage}\r\n`);
+           spotSent = true;
+           resetTimeout();
+         }
+         return;
+       }
+       
+       // Check for spot confirmation
+       if (spotSent) {
+         if (dataBuffer.includes('DX de') || dataBuffer.includes('Spot confirmed') || dataBuffer.includes('DX de ' + originator)) {
+           console.log(`[DXSPOT] Spot confirmed by ${host}`);
+           client.destroy();
+           resolve({ success: true, message: `Spot sent successfully to ${host}.` });
+           return;
+         }
+       }
+       
+       resetTimeout();
+     });
+     
+     client.on('close', () => {
+       console.log(`[DXSPOT] Connection closed to ${host}`);
+       if (stepTimeout) clearTimeout(stepTimeout);
+       if (!spotSent) {
+         resolve({ success: false, error: 'Connection closed before spot sent' });
+       }
+     });
+     
+     client.on('error', (err) => {
+       console.error(`[DXSPOT] Error with ${host}:`, err);
+       if (stepTimeout) clearTimeout(stepTimeout);
+       resolve({ success: false, error: err.message });
+     });
+     
+     resetTimeout();
+   });
+ }
+ 
+ module.exports = { sendDXSpot, sendDXSpotMultiCluster }; 
```

Now let me create a verification system to check if spots are actually appearing on DXSummit.fi:

```diff
- 
+ const https = require('https');
+ 
+ // Function to check if a spot appears on DXSummit.fi
+ async function checkDXSummitSpot({ dxCall, frequency, originator, comment, timeoutMs = 120000 }) {
+   return new Promise((resolve) => {
+     console.log(`[DXSUMMIT-VERIFY] Checking for spot: ${dxCall} on ${frequency} kHz`);
+     console.log(`[DXSUMMIT-VERIFY] Originator: ${originator}, Comment: ${comment}`);
+     
+     const startTime = Date.now();
+     const checkInterval = 10000; // Check every 10 seconds
+     const maxChecks = Math.floor(timeoutMs / checkInterval);
+     let checkCount = 0;
+     
+     const checkForSpot = async () => {
+       checkCount++;
+       console.log(`[DXSUMMIT-VERIFY] Check ${checkCount}/${maxChecks} - ${Math.round((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000)}s elapsed`);
+       
+       try {
+         const result = await fetchDXSummitData();
+         
+         if (result.success) {
+           const found = searchForSpot(result.data, { dxCall, frequency, originator, comment });
+           
+           if (found) {
+             console.log(`[DXSUMMIT-VERIFY] ✅ Spot found on DXSummit.fi!`);
+             console.log(`[DXSUMMIT-VERIFY] Found after ${Math.round((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000)} seconds`);
+             resolve({ 
+               success: true, 
+               found: true, 
+               timeElapsed: Math.round((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),
+               spotData: found
+             });
+             return;
+           }
+         }
+         
+         // If we haven't found it yet and haven't exceeded max checks, try again
+         if (checkCount < maxChecks) {
+           setTimeout(checkForSpot, checkInterval);
+         } else {
+           console.log(`[DXSUMMIT-VERIFY] ❌ Spot not found after ${Math.round((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000)} seconds`);
+           resolve({ 
+             success: true, 
+             found: false, 
+             timeElapsed: Math.round((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),
+             message: 'Spot not found within timeout period'
+           });
+         }
+         
+       } catch (error) {
+         console.error(`[DXSUMMIT-VERIFY] Error during check ${checkCount}:`, error.message);
+         
+         if (checkCount < maxChecks) {
+           setTimeout(checkForSpot, checkInterval);
+         } else {
+           resolve({ 
+             success: false, 
+             error: error.message,
+             timeElapsed: Math.round((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000)
+           });
+         }
+       }
+     };
+     
+     // Start checking after a short delay
+     setTimeout(checkForSpot, 5000);
+   });
+ }
+ 
+ // Fetch data from DXSummit.fi
+ async function fetchDXSummitData() {
+   return new Promise((resolve) => {
+     const options = {
+       hostname: 'dxsummit.fi',
+       port: 443,
+       path: '/api/spots',
+       method: 'GET',
+       headers: {
+         'User-Agent': 'America250-NCS/1.0',
+         'Accept': 'application/json'
+       },
+       timeout: 10000
+     };
+     
+     const req = https.request(options, (res) => {
+       let data = '';
+       
+       res.on('data', (chunk) => {
+         data += chunk;
+       });
+       
+       res.on('end', () => {
+         try {
+           if (res.statusCode === 200) {
+             const jsonData = JSON.parse(data);
+             resolve({ success: true, data: jsonData });
+           } else {
+             resolve({ success: false, error: `HTTP ${res.statusCode}` });
+           }
+         } catch (error) {
+           resolve({ success: false, error: 'Invalid JSON response' });
+         }
+       });
+     });
+     
+     req.on('error', (error) => {
+       resolve({ success: false, error: error.message });
+     });
+     
+     req.on('timeout', () => {
+       req.destroy();
+       resolve({ success: false, error: 'Request timeout' });
+     });
+     
+     req.end();
+   });
+ }
+ 
+ // Search for a specific spot in the DXSummit data
+ function searchForSpot(spotsData, { dxCall, frequency, originator, comment }) {
+   if (!spotsData || !Array.isArray(spotsData)) {
+     return null;
+   }
+   
+   const frequencyKhz = parseInt(frequency);
+   const tolerance = 1; // 1 kHz tolerance
+   
+   for (const spot of spotsData) {
+     // Check if this spot matches our criteria
+     const spotFreq = parseInt(spot.frequency);
+     const matchesFreq = Math.abs(spotFreq - frequencyKhz) <= tolerance;
+     const matchesCall = spot.callsign && spot.callsign.toUpperCase() === dxCall.toUpperCase();
+     const matchesOriginator = spot.spotter && spot.spotter.toUpperCase() === originator.toUpperCase();
+     const matchesComment = spot.comment && spot.comment.toUpperCase().includes(comment.toUpperCase());
+     
+     if (matchesCall && matchesFreq) {
+       console.log(`[DXSUMMIT-VERIFY] Found matching spot:`, {
+         callsign: spot.callsign,
+         frequency: spot.frequency,
+         spotter: spot.spotter,
+         comment: spot.comment,
+         timestamp: spot.timestamp
+       });
+       
+       // If we also match originator or comment, that's even better
+       if (matchesOriginator || matchesComment) {
+         return spot;
+       }
+       
+       // Return the spot even if originator/comment don't match (might be different format)
+       return spot;
+     }
+   }
+   
+   return null;
+ }
+ 
+ // Alternative method: Check DXSummit.fi web page for spots
+ async function checkDXSummitWebPage({ dxCall, frequency, originator, comment, timeoutMs = 120000 }) {
+   return new Promise((resolve) => {
+     console.log(`[DXSUMMIT-WEB] Checking DXSummit.fi web page for spot: ${dxCall} on ${frequency} kHz`);
+     
+     const startTime = Date.now();
+     const checkInterval = 15000; // Check every 15 seconds
+     const maxChecks = Math.floor(timeoutMs / checkInterval);
+     let checkCount = 0;
+     
+     const checkForSpot = async () => {
+       checkCount++;
+       console.log(`[DXSUMMIT-WEB] Check ${checkCount}/${maxChecks} - ${Math.round((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000)}s elapsed`);
+       
+       try {
+         const result = await fetchDXSummitWebPage();
+         
+         if (result.success) {
+           const found = searchForSpotInHTML(result.data, { dxCall, frequency, originator, comment });
+           
+           if (found) {
+             console.log(`[DXSUMMIT-WEB] ✅ Spot found on DXSummit.fi web page!`);
+             resolve({ 
+               success: true, 
+               found: true, 
+               timeElapsed: Math.round((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),
+               method: 'web-page'
+             });
+             return;
+           }
+         }
+         
+         if (checkCount < maxChecks) {
+           setTimeout(checkForSpot, checkInterval);
+         } else {
+           console.log(`[DXSUMMIT-WEB] ❌ Spot not found on web page after ${Math.round((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000)} seconds`);
+           resolve({ 
+             success: true, 
+             found: false, 
+             timeElapsed: Math.round((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),
+             method: 'web-page'
+           });
+         }
+         
+       } catch (error) {
+         console.error(`[DXSUMMIT-WEB] Error during check ${checkCount}:`, error.message);
+         
+         if (checkCount < maxChecks) {
+           setTimeout(checkForSpot, checkInterval);
+         } else {
+           resolve({ 
+             success: false, 
+             error: error.message,
+             timeElapsed: Math.round((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000)
+           });
+         }
+       }
+     };
+     
+     setTimeout(checkForSpot, 5000);
+   });
+ }
+ 
+ // Fetch DXSummit.fi web page
+ async function fetchDXSummitWebPage() {
+   return new Promise((resolve) => {
+     const options = {
+       hostname: 'dxsummit.fi',
+       port: 443,
+       path: '/',
+       method: 'GET',
+       headers: {
+         'User-Agent': 'America250-NCS/1.0',
+         'Accept': 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8'
+       },
+       timeout: 10000
+     };
+     
+     const req = https.request(options, (res) => {
+       let data = '';
+       
+       res.on('data', (chunk) => {
+         data += chunk;
+       });
+       
+       res.on('end', () => {
+         if (res.statusCode === 200) {
+           resolve({ success: true, data });
+         } else {
+           resolve({ success: false, error: `HTTP ${res.statusCode}` });
+         }
+       });
+     });
+     
+     req.on('error', (error) => {
+       resolve({ success: false, error: error.message });
+     });
+     
+     req.on('timeout', () => {
+       req.destroy();
+       resolve({ success: false, error: 'Request timeout' });
+     });
+     
+     req.end();
+   });
+ }
+ 
+ // Search for spot in HTML content
+ function searchForSpotInHTML(htmlContent, { dxCall, frequency, originator, comment }) {
+   const frequencyKhz = parseInt(frequency);
+   const upperDxCall = dxCall.toUpperCase();
+   const upperOriginator = originator.toUpperCase();
+   const upperComment = comment.toUpperCase();
+   
+   // Look for patterns that might indicate our spot
+   const patterns = [
+     new RegExp(`${upperDxCall}[^a-zA-Z0-9]`, 'i'),
+     new RegExp(`${frequencyKhz}[^0-9]`, 'i'),
+     new RegExp(`${upperOriginator}[^a-zA-Z0-9]`, 'i'),
+     new RegExp(upperComment.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&'), 'i')
+   ];
+   
+   let matches = 0;
+   for (const pattern of patterns) {
+     if (pattern.test(htmlContent)) {
+       matches++;
+     }
+   }
+   
+   // If we find at least 2 matching patterns, consider it a potential match
+   return matches >= 2;
+ }
+ 
+ // Comprehensive verification that tries multiple methods
+ async function verifySpotOnDXSummit(spotData, options = {}) {
+   const { timeoutMs = 120000, useWebPage = true, useAPI = true } = options;
+   
+   console.log(`[DXSUMMIT-VERIFY] Starting comprehensive verification for spot:`, spotData);
+   
+   const results = [];
+   
+   // Try API method first
+   if (useAPI) {
+     console.log(`[DXSUMMIT-VERIFY] Trying API method...`);
+     const apiResult = await checkDXSummitSpot({ ...spotData, timeoutMs: timeoutMs / 2 });
+     results.push({ method: 'api', ...apiResult });
+     
+     if (apiResult.success && apiResult.found) {
+       return { success: true, found: true, method: 'api', result: apiResult };
+     }
+   }
+   
+   // Try web page method
+   if (useWebPage) {
+     console.log(`[DXSUMMIT-VERIFY] Trying web page method...`);
+     const webResult = await checkDXSummitWebPage({ ...spotData, timeoutMs: timeoutMs / 2 });
+     results.push({ method: 'web-page', ...webResult });
+     
+     if (webResult.success && webResult.found) {
+       return { success: true, found: true, method: 'web-page', result: webResult };
+     }
+   }
+   
+   // Return comprehensive results
+   return {
+     success: true,
+     found: false,
+     results,
+     message: 'Spot not found using any verification method'
+   };
+ }
+ 
+ module.exports = {
+   checkDXSummitSpot,
+   checkDXSummitWebPage,
+   verifySpotOnDXSummit,
+   fetchDXSummitData,
+   fetchDXSummitWebPage
+ }; 
```

Now let me create a verification API endpoint that can be called to check verification status:


---

```diff
- 
+ import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
+ const { verifySpotOnDXSummit } = require('../../../../lib/dxsummit-verifier');
+ 
+ export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
+   try {
+     const body = await request.json();
+     
+     // Validate required fields
+     const { dxCall, frequency, originator, comment } = body;
+     
+     if (!dxCall || !frequency || !originator) {
+       return NextResponse.json({ 
+         success: false, 
+         error: 'Missing required fields: dxCall, frequency, originator' 
+       }, { status: 400 });
+     }
+     
+     console.log(`[VERIFY-API] Starting verification for: ${dxCall} on ${frequency} kHz via ${originator}`);
+     
+     // Convert frequency to kHz if needed
+     const frequencyKhz = parseFloat(frequency.toString()) < 1000 ? 
+       Math.round(parseFloat(frequency.toString()) * 1000) : 
+       Math.round(parseFloat(frequency.toString()));
+     
+     const spotComment = comment || 'AMERICA250 SES';
+     
+     // Perform verification
+     const verificationResult = await verifySpotOnDXSummit({
+       dxCall,
+       frequency: frequencyKhz,
+       originator,
+       comment: spotComment
+     }, {
+       timeoutMs: 120000, // 2 minutes
+       useWebPage: true,
+       useAPI: true
+     });
+     
+     if (verificationResult.success) {
+       if (verificationResult.found) {
+         console.log(`[VERIFY-API] ✅ Spot verified on DXSummit.fi via ${verificationResult.method}`);
+         return NextResponse.json({
+           success: true,
+           found: true,
+           method: verificationResult.method,
+           timeElapsed: verificationResult.result?.timeElapsed || 'unknown',
+           message: `Spot confirmed on DXSummit.fi after ${verificationResult.result?.timeElapsed || 'unknown'} seconds`,
+           spotData: verificationResult.result?.spotData || null
+         });
+       } else {
+         console.log(`[VERIFY-API] ❌ Spot not found on DXSummit.fi`);
+         return NextResponse.json({
+           success: true,
+           found: false,
+           message: 'Spot not found on DXSummit.fi within timeout period',
+           results: verificationResult.results || [],
+           timeElapsed: verificationResult.results?.[0]?.timeElapsed || 'unknown'
+         });
+       }
+     } else {
+       console.log(`[VERIFY-API] ❌ Verification failed: ${verificationResult.error}`);
+       return NextResponse.json({
+         success: false,
+         error: verificationResult.error || 'Verification failed'
+       }, { status: 500 });
+     }
+     
+   } catch (error) {
+     console.error('Spot verification error:', error);
+     return NextResponse.json({ 
+       success: false, 
+       error: 'Invalid request format' 
+     }, { status: 400 });
+   }
+ } 
```

```diff
+ const { sendDXSpotMultiCluster } = require('./src/lib/spotter-telnet');

+ async function comprehensiveSpotTest() {

+   console.log('This test will:');
+   console.log('1. Send a unique test spot to DX clusters');
+   console.log('2. Verify the spot appears on DXSummit.fi');
+   console.log('3. Provide detailed results and recommendations');
+   console.log('');
+ 
+   // Generate unique test data
+   const testFrequency = Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000) + 7000; // Random frequency 7000-8000 kHz

+

+   console.log(`- DX Call: ${testCall}`);

+   console.log(`- Originator: ${testOriginator}`);
+   console.log('');
+ 
+   try {

+     console.log('Step 1: Sending spot to DX clusters...');
+     const spotResult = await sendDXSpotMultiCluster({
+       originator: testOriginator,
+       dxCall: testCall,
+       frequency: testFrequency,
+       comment: testComment,
+       mode: 'SSB'
+     });
+

+       return;
+     }
+ 
+     console.log('✅ SUCCESS: Spot sent to DX cluster and confirmed');
+     console.log(`Cluster used: ${spotResult.cluster}`);
+     console.log('');
+ 
+     // Step 2: Verify spot appears on DXSummit.fi
+     console.log('Step 2: Verifying spot appears on DXSummit.fi...');
+     console.log('This may take up to 2 minutes...');
+     console.log('');
+ 
+     const verificationResult = await verifySpotOnDXSummit({
+       dxCall: testCall,
+       frequency: testFrequency,
+       originator: testOriginator,
+       comment: testComment
+     }, {
+       timeoutMs: 120000, // 2 minutes
+       useWebPage: true,
+       useAPI: true
+     });
+ 
+     if (verificationResult.success && verificationResult.found) {

+       }
+     } else {

+       console.log('Verification results:', verificationResult.results || []);
+     }
+     console.log('');
+ 
+     // Step 3: Production readiness assessment

+     console.log(`✅ Spot Format: CORRECT`);
+     console.log(`✅ Authentication: SUCCESSFUL`);
+     console.log(`✅ Spot Confirmation: RECEIVED`);
+     
+     if (verificationResult.success && verificationResult.found) {
+       console.log(`✅ DXSummit.fi Propagation: VERIFIED (${verificationResult.result?.timeElapsed || 'unknown'}s)`);
+       console.log('');
+       console.log('🎉 PRODUCTION READY!');
+       console.log('Your spots are successfully propagating to DXSummit.fi');
+       console.log('');
+       console.log('Recommendations:');
+       console.log('- Deploy to production');
+       console.log('- Monitor verification results');
+       console.log('- Consider adding more DX clusters for redundancy');
+     } else {

+       console.log('');

+       console.log('Spots are being sent to DX clusters but DXSummit.fi verification failed');
```

```
ed near Vancouver BC\r\n \r\nTo see FT8 spots you MUST enter SET/FT8\r\nTo see Skimmer spots you must SET/SK
```

```
+        }),
+      });
+
+      if (spotResponse.ok) {

+          setCanRespot(true);
+          setDXSiteSpotCooldown(600); // 10 min cooldown

+          setTimeout(() => setSpottingMessage(''), 5000);
+        } else {
+          setSpottingMessage('❌ Spot not confirmed: ' + (spotData.error || 'Unknown error'));
+          setTimeout(() => setSpottingMessage(''), 5000);
+        }
+      } else {

diff --git a/src/lib/input-validation.ts b/src/lib/input-validation.ts
index 7a9c373..57b112c 100644
--- a/src/lib/input-validation.ts
+++ b/src/lib/input-validation.ts
@@ -80,6 +80,15 @@ export const activationCreateSchema = z.object({
   state: stateSchema
 });
 
+// Telnet spotting schema
+export const telnetSpotSchema = z.object({
+  originator: callsignSchema,
+  dxCall: callsignSchema,
+  frequency: z.number().positive('Frequency must be positive').max(50000, 'Frequency too high'),
+  comment: z.string().min(1, 'Comment cannot be empty').max(50, 'Comment too long'),
+  mode: z.string().min(1, 'Mode cannot be empty').max(10, 'Mode too long')
+});
+
 /**
  * Sanitize HTML content to prevent XSS
  */
@@ -160,6 +169,25 @@ export function validateUploadRequest(data: unknown): {
   }
 }
 
+/**
+ * Validate telnet spotting request
+ */
+export function validateTelnetSpot(data: unknown): { 
+  isValid: boolean; 
+  data?: z.infer<typeof telnetSpotSchema>; 
+  error?: string 
+} {
+  try {
+    const validatedData = telnetSpotSchema.parse(data);
+    return { isValid: true, data: validatedData };
+  } catch (error) {
+    if (error instanceof z.ZodError) {
+      return { isValid: false, error: error.errors[0]?.message || 'Invalid telnet spot data' };
+    }
+    return { isValid: false, error: 'Telnet spot validation failed' };
+  }
+}
+
 /**
  * Enhanced ADI file validation with detailed error reporting
  */
```

```
dmin UI

se parchment backgrounds for all admin sections

admin spot status display.
```
